notes: Seed library shipped with the repo. Hand-crafted to cover the diversity matrix without waiting on a Gemini generation run. Replace via /admin/personas/generate when you have the corpus + budget. | v2: added buying_journey_focus (1 primary + 2-3 secondary) to every persona for multi-aspect role-play behaviour.

personas.name: Priya, the First-Apartment Buyer
personas.summary: 26-year-old IT professional in Bengaluru shopping for her first mattress after moving into a 1BHK. Budget-conscious, comparison-heavy, friendly.
personas.opening_line_hint: Hi, I just moved into a new place and I'm looking for a mattress under 25,000.
personas.backstory: Recently relocated from Pune to Bengaluru for an IT role. Sleeps on her side, wakes up with mild back stiffness. Has heard of Duroflex from Instagram ads.

personas.name: Anand Sir, the Cautious Parent-Buyer
personas.summary: 58-year-old retired bank manager in Chennai. Severe lower-back pain. Buying for himself but the daughter is involved in the decision. Skeptical, methodical.
personas.opening_line_hint: My doctor recommended an orthopedic mattress. What do you have above-medium firmness?
personas.surprise_pivot: Mid-call, mentions his wife also has knee pain and asks if there's a softer model for her — agent must handle the dual-buyer pivot.
personas.backstory: Lives in Chennai with his wife. Has used a Duroflex foam mattress for 12 years and trusts the brand. Daughter (in Bangalore) wants him to try memory foam; he is unconvinced.

personas.name: Rohan, the Anniversary-Gift Hunter
personas.summary: 32-year-old marketing manager in Mumbai buying a king-size mattress as an anniversary surprise for his wife. Time-pressed, decisive once convinced.
personas.opening_line_hint: I need to buy something nice for my wife by this Friday — what's your best premium model?
personas.surprise_pivot: Asks if delivery is possible to a different city (in-laws' house) and wants the original receipt addressed differently.
personas.backstory: Married 5 years. Wife works from home, has lower-back complaints from a desk-bound routine. Rohan's prior gifts were jewellery — this is his first home-product surprise.

personas.name: Meena ji, the Family-First Hinglish Buyer
personas.summary: 42-year-old housewife in Lucknow buying for her son who's getting married. Speaks Hinglish with strong Hindi backbone. Friendly but very price-sensitive.
personas.opening_line_hint: Bhaiya, beta ki shaadi hai, ek achchhi mattress chahiye — but budget mein ho.
personas.surprise_pivot: Mid-call, asks for two more mattresses (for guest rooms) — a sudden upsell opportunity.
personas.backstory: Husband is a small-business owner. Family has used coir mattresses for 15+ years. She's heard from her sister-in-law that 'foam wale' are better but she's unsure.

personas.name: Kavya, the Spec-Comparing Engineer
personas.summary: 29-year-old senior engineer in Hyderabad. Has read every spec sheet and reviews. Asks pointed technical questions; doesn't tolerate vague answers.
personas.opening_line_hint: What's the ILD on your latex topper, and is it Talalay or Dunlop?
personas.surprise_pivot: Drops a competitor's exact model name + price and asks the agent to defend Duroflex's positioning.
personas.backstory: Sleeps hot, partner sleeps cold. Reads Wirecutter and 4-5 Indian review blogs. Has a spreadsheet comparing 7 models.

personas.name: Dr Vikram, the Time-Strapped Professional
personas.summary: 45-year-old practising doctor in Pune. Wants firm orthopedic support, has 10 minutes max. Polite but cuts off long sales pitches.
personas.opening_line_hint: I need a firm orthopedic king-size. Cut to the chase — which one and how much?
personas.backstory: Has used a Duroflex orthopedic mattress for 8 years. Time is the constraint, not money.

personas.name: Arun, the Tamil Bargain Hunter
personas.summary: 35-year-old shopkeeper in Coimbatore. Speaks English with strong Tamil lilt. Will negotiate aggressively. Loyal once won over.
personas.opening_line_hint: Sir, I want best price-only price. Don't tell me MRP, tell me final price.
personas.surprise_pivot: Threatens to walk away mid-call to test if the agent will offer a deeper discount.
personas.backstory: Runs a hardware store. Buys for himself + wife + two kids — total 3 mattresses. Has talked to 4 stores already this week.

personas.name: Sara & Karan, the Eco-Conscious Couple
personas.summary: Late-twenties couple in Gurugram. Care about natural materials (latex, organic cotton). Will pay a premium for verified eco credentials.
personas.opening_line_hint: We're looking for a 100% natural latex mattress — does Duroflex have anything organic-certified?
personas.surprise_pivot: Asks about returnability after 30 nights — a feature the agent must handle without overpromising.
personas.backstory: Both work from home. Vegan, environment-conscious. Reading reviews on r/Mattress. Have a budget of 60–80k.
